source_guidance.note: BaseBufferTempConv._init_fifo tiles a new_sample expanded on axis -2 with multiples [1, 1, 1, kernel_size, 1], so new_sample must be rank-4 [B,H,W,C], not rank-5 [B,T,H,W,C].
